backward_compatibility.rationale: Config changes affect future enrichment runs only. Published SGFs are immutable static files. Git history preserves old values.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Remove unused/invalid keys. No backward compatibility layer needed for a .cfg file.

option_selection.rationale: Unanimous governance approval. Tsumego-Optimized: fixes 4 unused keys, restores exploration defaults, adds early-phase tesuji boost (tempEarly=1.5). Bounded risk, meaningful upside for puzzle quality.
